notes: This config is designed for the new prop-driven homepage section components.
It assumes the current Pupwiki branch still routes mixed-breed detail pages through /breeds/[slug].
When a real /mixed-breeds hub goes live, update routes.mixedBreedHub and routes.mixedBreedDetailPrefix.

seo.title: PupWiki | Trusted Guidance for Dog Parents
seo.description: Research breeds and mixed breeds, compare dog ownership costs, understand health and care needs, explore training guidance, and make smarter dog-parent decisions with PupWiki.

hero.title: Research breeds, plan costs, and care smarter.
hero.subtitle: PupWiki helps dog parents compare breeds and mixed breeds, understand health and care needs, explore training and lifestyle guidance, and make more confident ownership decisions.
hero.imageAlt: Happy dog owner with a golden retriever
hero.heroCardText: Breed profiles, mixed breeds, cost tools, care guidance, and practical next steps.

primaryJourneys.title: Everything you need before you decide
primaryJourneys.subtitle: Start with the right questions — breed fit, real costs, and what first-time ownership actually looks like.

items.title: Find the right breed
items.description: Explore 277 breed profiles, compare temperament, size, and care needs, and narrow down the best fit for your lifestyle.

items.title: Plan the real cost
items.description: Estimate first-year and lifetime ownership costs, vet budgets, insurance, and practical planning needs before you commit.

items.title: First dog guide
items.description: Everything first-time dog owners need to know — from puppy prep to training fundamentals and what to budget for.

items.title: Take the breed quiz
items.description: Answer 4 questions about your lifestyle and living situation and get matched to your top 3 breed fits.

trustStrip.note: Built to help dog parents compare breeds, plan costs, and care with more confidence.

breedDiscovery.title: Explore popular dog breeds
breedDiscovery.subtitle: Start with familiar favorites, then branch into breed guides that match your lifestyle, experience, and care expectations.

fallbackBreeds.name: Golden Retriever
fallbackBreeds.subtitle: Reliable, affectionate, and eager to please

fallbackBreeds.name: French Bulldog
fallbackBreeds.subtitle: Compact companion with strong urban appeal

mixedBreedDiscovery.title: Popular mixed breed guides
mixedBreedDiscovery.subtitle: Explore mixed-breed profiles, likely trait blends, and practical care guidance based on parent-breed patterns.

careDecisionLayer.title: The practical side of dog ownership
careDecisionLayer.subtitle: Move from curiosity to confident decisions with care, training, health, and lifestyle guidance.

cards.title: Health & vet care
cards.description: Understand breed-linked health patterns, care watch-outs, and practical guidance for everyday ownership.

cards.title: Training & behavior
cards.description: Explore trainability, routine-building, behavior patterns, and practical next steps for better day-to-day life.

cards.title: Nutrition & feeding
cards.description: Compare feeding approaches, food guidance, and practical nutrition considerations by breed and lifestyle.

cards.title: Lifestyle & gear
cards.description: Browse practical product and lifestyle guidance for sleep, travel, safety, and daily routines.

editorialHighlights.title: Guides, comparisons, and practical reads
editorialHighlights.subtitle: Use curated editorial picks now, then switch to fully dynamic homepage content later.

fallbackItems.title: Fi vs Tractive: Which dog GPS tracker is better?
fallbackItems.description: A practical comparison of tracking reliability, battery life, subscriptions, and day-to-day usability.

fallbackItems.title: The Farmer's Dog vs Ollie
fallbackItems.description: A useful look at ingredients, convenience, delivery, and whether premium fresh food is actually worth it.

fallbackItems.title: The true lifetime cost of a French Bulldog
fallbackItems.description: Understand ongoing ownership costs, common care expenses, and why planning ahead matters.

methodologyTeaser.title: Clear, practical, and transparent guidance
methodologyTeaser.description: PupWiki is built to help dog parents make better decisions with structured breed data, practical care guidance, and transparent editorial standards.
bullets: Breed and mixed-breed research grounded in structured data
A growing platform for breed, cost, care, and decision support

leadCapture.title: Stay in the loop
leadCapture.description: Get practical dog guidance, new breed and mixed-breed guides, and carefully selected updates from PupWiki.
leadCapture.disclaimer: No spam. Only practical dog guidance, updates, and occasional curated recommendations.
